title: Delegation scope badge
notes: Small badge shown next to a role name in shell nav / role pickers / permission-denied banners when the caller is currently exercising a delegation for that role.
Example rendering: `Finance Manager (via Alice)` where `via Alice` is the badge.
Reads acting_as(user, role) (helpers.json) — matches at most one active delegation for the (user, role) tuple; when nothing matches, the widget renders null.

user.description: The user whose delegate-status to check (typically the caller = auth()->user()).

variant.description: inline = simple parenthetical text; pill = a Chip with the delegator's avatar + display_name.
